title: React dashboard shell
acceptance_criteria: frontend/package.json: separate Bun/npm project (can use npm in the frontend since it's a separate workspace from the backend — or Bun, document the choice); dependencies: react@18, react-dom@18, zustand, lightweight-charts, @tanstack/react-query; devDependencies: vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, typescript, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, @types/react, @types/react-dom
vite.config.ts: server.proxy routes /api and /ws to http://localhost:3000 (Fastify backend) so the Vite dev server and API work together without CORS issues in dev

frontend/src/store/trading.ts: Zustand store with state: straddleHistory (array of {time, value, roc}), openTrades (array of PaperTrade), todayPnl (Decimal string), wsStatus ('connecting'|'connected'|'disconnected'). Actions: addStraddleTick, setTrades, updatePnl, setWsStatus

frontend/src/hooks/useWebSocket.ts: connects to ws://localhost:3000/ws/ticks (proxied via Vite); on message: parses JSON, dispatches to Zustand store; reconnects with 3s delay on disconnect; updates wsStatus
frontend/src/components/StraddleChart.tsx: Lightweight Charts line chart showing straddle_value over time; updates in real-time from Zustand store; shows last 100 data points

frontend/src/components/TradesTable.tsx: table of today's trades from GET /dashboard/summary; columns: entry time, ATM strike, entry value, current P&L, status, exit reason; polled every 10s via react-query
frontend/src/components/PnlDisplay.tsx: displays total running P&L for today; green if positive, red if negative
frontend/src/App.tsx: assembles StraddleChart + PnlDisplay + TradesTable + WS status indicator; read-only, no user actions
vite build (run from frontend/ directory) completes without TypeScript errors or build errors
frontend is deliberately a separate package from the backend — no shared TypeScript files between frontend/ and src/
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
